---
title: ""
---

<div class="about-hero reveal">
<h1 class="gradient-text-animated">About Me</h1>
<p class="about-lead">Business Analytics student at BYU-Idaho building decision-grade analytics for complex organizations.</p>
</div>

<div class="about-grid">

<div class="about-section reveal">
<h2>Background</h2>
<p>I am a Business Analytics student at BYU-Idaho (4.0 GPA) with minors in Statistics and Data Science. I am building a long-term career at the intersection of analytics, operations, and systems strategy. My academic path is deliberately technical and operational.</p>
<p>Healthcare impact is personal for me. Family health challenges shaped how I think about meaningful work. That is why I am deeply committed to operational and platform-level analytics that improve patient outcomes and system reliability.</p>
</div>

<div class="about-section reveal">
<h2>What Drives My Work</h2>
<div class="about-values">
<div class="value-item"><div class="value-icon">&#9670;</div><div><strong>Bottlenecks</strong><p>Constraints that limit throughput, access, and quality</p></div></div>
<div class="value-item"><div class="value-icon">&#9670;</div><div><strong>Risk Surfaces</strong><p>Where uncertainty meets real cost and consequence</p></div></div>
<div class="value-item"><div class="value-icon">&#9670;</div><div><strong>Intervention Thresholds</strong><p>Knowing when to act, not just what to measure</p></div></div>
<div class="value-item"><div class="value-icon">&#9670;</div><div><strong>Real Constraints</strong><p>Tradeoffs under actual operating conditions</p></div></div>
</div>
<p style="margin-top: 1rem; color: var(--muted);">I am not interested in surface-level reporting. I am interested in building analytics that change decisions.</p>
</div>

</div>

<div class="about-tech reveal">
<h2><span class="gradient-text">Technical Stack</span></h2>
<div class="tech-grid">
<div class="tech-card"><h4>Python</h4><p>pandas, NumPy, scikit-learn, XGBoost, SHAP, simulation</p></div>
<div class="tech-card"><h4>SQL</h4><p>Joins, CTEs, normalization, optimization, analytics views</p></div>
<div class="tech-card"><h4>R</h4><p>tidyverse, regression, statistical modeling</p></div>
<div class="tech-card"><h4>BI Tools</h4><p>Power BI (DAX, decomposition trees, KPI design), Excel forecasting</p></div>
<div class="tech-card"><h4>Systems</h4><p>ETL workflows, relational schema design, reproducible pipelines</p></div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="about-working-style reveal">
<h2><span class="gradient-text">Working Style</span></h2>
<div class="style-grid">
<div class="style-item"><span class="style-icon">&#9654;</span><span>High ownership</span></div>
<div class="style-item"><span class="style-icon">&#9654;</span><span>High intensity</span></div>
<div class="style-item"><span class="style-icon">&#9654;</span><span>Strategic and long-horizon</span></div>
<div class="style-item"><span class="style-icon">&#9654;</span><span>Values-driven and impact-focused</span></div>
<div class="style-item"><span class="style-icon">&#9654;</span><span>Most effective in autonomous, complex build environments</span></div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="about-cta reveal">
<p>Data and analytics builder designing decision-grade systems for complex organizations, with a focus on operational risk, healthcare impact, and systems thinking.</p>
<a class="btn-primary" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/markuss-saule/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Connect on LinkedIn</a>
</div>
